titleZh: 上海某某公司诉上海某某股权投资中心等、第三人叶某某股权转让纠纷案
titleEn: Database Case: Shanghai Company v. Shanghai Equity Investment Center et al., with Ye Moumou as Third Party
forumZh: 人民法院案例库（最高人民法院审核入库）
forumEn: People's Court Case Database (reviewed by the Supreme People's Court)
issuesZh: 对赌失败后的股权回购是否适用股东优先购买权
股权代持、代签对回购协议效力的影响
全体原股东是否承担连带回购责任
issuesEn: whether a post-VAM-failure buyback is subject to shareholder pre-emption rights
the effect of nominee shareholding and delegated signatures on buyback validity
whether the original shareholders bear joint repurchase liability
holdingZh: 法院将对赌失败后的股权回购理解为附条件的股权转让安排，而非通常意义上向股东以外第三人转让股权，因此不适用公司法上的股东优先购买权规则。对于全体原股东共同签署并约定承担不可撤销连带责任的情形，法院支持投资人主张连带回购责任。
holdingEn: The court characterized the repurchase obligation arising after failure of the VAM arrangement as a conditional internal equity transfer rather than an ordinary transfer to an outside third party, and therefore held that statutory shareholder pre-emption rules did not apply. Where the original shareholders jointly undertook an irrevocable joint-liability obligation, the investor could enforce joint repurchase liability against them.
